channel.title: Tom Pickup - Lancashire County Councillor
channel.description: News, analysis and updates from Tom Pickup, Lancashire County Councillor for Padiham and Burnley West. Reform UK. Council finance, highways, social care and local government transparency.

item.title: The Numbers Don't Lie: Why Lancashire Should Think Twice About LGR
item.description: Reform UK's critical analysis of Lancashire's local government reorganisation reveals the financial case is far narrower than claimed, and the risks far greater.
item.author: Tom Pickup

item.title: 9 Months of Reform: Lancashire by the Numbers
item.description: On 1 May 2025, Reform UK took control of Lancashire County Council with 53 of 84 seats. Nine months in, the numbers tell the story. Every metric measured against the Conservative baseline.
item.author: Tom Pickup

item.title: Lancashire Retains Armed Forces Covenant Gold Award
item.description: Lancashire County Council retained its Defence Employer Recognition Scheme Gold Award at Full Council last week. 53,567 veterans call Lancashire home.
item.author: Tom Pickup
